title: Uwuify
body:
# uwuify
uwu youw minyecwaft~

takes chat and the language files and uwu-ifys them, client side    
this does not uwuify chat messages sent for other players    
also the narrarator has a stroke
![Chat being uwu'd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qA7sc3dg/images/79d7ef22ac148ce12598472315f0ffef9afd9bd6.png)
